title: Aging Populations Reshape Economies
subtitle: 当全球变老，经济会发生什么变化

paragraphs.en: Demographic shifts toward older populations are transforming economies worldwide. In countries from Japan to Germany, declining birth rates and increasing longevity have inverted traditional age pyramids. By mid-century, retirees may outnumber working-age adults in many developed nations, creating unprecedented economic challenges.
paragraphs.zh: 人口向老龄化的转变正在改变全球经济。从日本到德国，出生率下降和寿命延长已经颠倒了传统的年龄金字塔。到本世纪中叶，在许多发达国家，退休人员可能超过劳动年龄人口，造成前所未有的经济挑战。

words.meaning: adj. 人口的，人口统计的

paragraphs.en: Healthcare systems face mounting pressure as populations age. Chronic conditions requiring ongoing treatment become more prevalent, while the supply of healthcare workers struggles to keep pace. Countries must either dramatically increase healthcare spending or accept difficult trade-offs in service provision.
paragraphs.zh: 随着人口老龄化，医疗保健系统面临越来越大的压力。需要持续治疗的慢性病变得更加普遍，而医护人员的供应难以跟上步伐。各国必须要么大幅增加医疗保健支出，要么在服务提供方面接受艰难的权衡取舍。

paragraphs.en: Pension systems designed for shorter lifespans face potential insolvency. Workers paying into retirement funds will be fewer while beneficiaries drawing from them multiply. Governments must choose between raising retirement ages, increasing taxes, reducing benefits, or accumulating unsustainable debt.
paragraphs.zh: 为较短寿命设计的养老金制度面临潜在的破产风险。缴纳退休基金的工人将减少，而从中领取的受益人则在增加。政府必须在提高退休年龄、增加税收、减少福利或积累不可持续的债务之间做出选择。

paragraphs.en: Labor shortages in aging societies drive technological adaptation and immigration debates. Automation and robotics may compensate for missing workers in some industries. Meanwhile, immigration offers potential solutions but generates political tensions in societies uncertain about demographic change.
paragraphs.zh: 老龄化社会中的劳动力短缺推动了技术适应和移民辩论。自动化和机器人技术可能在某些行业弥补缺失的工人。与此同时，移民提供了潜在的解决方案，但在对人口变化不确定的社会中引发了政治紧张。

paragraphs.en: Innovative approaches to aging are emerging globally. Some countries promote active aging programs that keep seniors healthy and engaged in communities longer. Others experiment with intergenerational living arrangements that benefit both young and old. Successfully adapting to aging populations requires reimagining how societies organize work, care, and community.
paragraphs.zh: 创新的老龄化应对方法正在全球涌现。一些国家推广积极老龄化项目，使老年人保持健康并更长时间地参与社区活动。其他国家则尝试对年轻人和老年人都有益的代际居住安排。成功适应老龄化人口需要重新构想社会如何组织工作、照料和社区。
